```{r}
  discriminator = dcgan_discriminator,
  x_train = x_train_4d,
  epochs = 30,
  batch_size = 64,
  latent_dim = latent_dim,
  sample_interval = 10
)
```

```{r}
# 生成并可视化DCGAN生成的图像
generate_dcgan_images <- function(generator, latent_dim, n_images = 25) {
  noise <- matrix(runif(n_images * latent_dim, -1, 1),
                  nrow = n_images, ncol = latent_dim)
  generated <- predict(generator, noise, verbose = 0)
  # 将[-1, 1]转换回[0, 1]
  generated <- (generated + 1) / 2
  return(generated)
}

# 生成图像
dcgan_images <- generate_dcgan_images(trained_generator, latent_dim, 25)

# 可视化
par(mfrow = c(5, 5), mar = c(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 0.1))
for (i in 1:25) {
  image(dcgan_images[i, , , 1], col = gray.colors(100), axes = FALSE)
}
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

## 8.4 条件 GAN（cGAN）基础 {#84-条件-gancgan基础}

条件GAN通过向生成器和判别器提供额外条件信息，实现可控生成。

### cGAN的结构

- 生成器输入：噪声向量 + 条件标签
- 判别器输入：图像 + 条件标签

```{r}
# 构建条件GAN

# 参数
latent_dim <- 100
n_classes <- 10  # MNIST的10个数字类别

# 生成器：接收噪声和标签
noise_input <- layer_input(shape = c(latent_dim))
label_input <- layer_input(shape = c(1))

# 标签嵌入
label_embedding <- layer_embedding(input_dim = n_classes, output_dim = 50)(label_input)
label_embedding <- layer_flatten()(label_embedding)

# 合并噪声和标签
generator_input <- layer_concatenate(list(noise_input, label_embedding))

# 生成器网络
x <- layer_dense(units = 128 * 7 * 7, activation = "relu")(generator_input)
x <- layer_reshape(target_shape = c(7, 7, 128))(x)
x <- layer_batch_normalization()(x)
x <- layer_activation("relu")(x)

x <- layer_conv_2d_transpose(filters = 128, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                              strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(x)
x <- layer_batch_normalization()(x)
x <- layer_activation("relu")(x)

x <- layer_conv_2d_transpose(filters = 64, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                              strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(x)
x <- layer_batch_normalization()(x)
x <- layer_activation("relu")(x)

x <- layer_conv_2d(filters = 1, kernel_size = c(7, 7),
                   padding = "same", activation = "tanh")(x)

cgan_generator <- keras_model(list(noise_input, label_input), x)

cat("条件GAN生成器结构：\n")
summary(cgan_generator)
```

```{r}
# 判别器：接收图像和标签
image_input <- layer_input(shape = c(28, 28, 1))
label_input_d <- layer_input(shape = c(1))

# 标签嵌入并扩展到图像尺寸
label_embedding_d <- layer_embedding(input_dim = n_classes, output_dim = 50)(label_input_d)
label_embedding_d <- layer_flatten()(label_embedding_d)
label_embedding_d <- layer_dense(units = 28 * 28)(label_embedding_d)
label_embedding_d <- layer_reshape(target_shape = c(28, 28, 1))(label_embedding_d)

# 合并图像和标签
discriminator_input <- layer_concatenate(list(image_input, label_embedding_d))

# 判别器网络
x <- layer_conv_2d(filters = 64, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                   strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(discriminator_input)
x <- layer_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.2)(x)

x <- layer_conv_2d(filters = 128, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                   strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(x)
x <- layer_batch_normalization()(x)
x <- layer_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.2)(x)

x <- layer_flatten()(x)
x <- layer_dense(units = 1, activation = "sigmoid")(x)

cgan_discriminator <- keras_model(list(image_input, label_input_d), x)

cat("条件GAN判别器结构：\n")
summary(cgan_discriminator)
```

```{r}
# 编译条件GAN
cgan_discriminator %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.0002, beta_1 = 0.5),
  loss = "binary_crossentropy"
)

# 组合模型
freeze_weights(cgan_discriminator)

cgan_output <- cgan_discriminator(list(
  cgan_generator(list(noise_input, label_input)),
  label_input
))

cgan <- keras_model(list(noise_input, label_input), cgan_output)

cgan %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.0002, beta_1 = 0.5),
  loss = "binary_crossentropy"
)

cat("条件GAN组合模型已创建\n")
```

```{r}
# 使用条件GAN生成指定数字的图像
generate_conditional_images <- function(generator, latent_dim, label, n_images = 5) {
  noise <- matrix(runif(n_images * latent_dim, -1, 1),
                  nrow = n_images, ncol = latent_dim)
  labels <- rep(label, n_images)
  
  generated <- predict(generator, list(noise, labels), verbose = 0)
  generated <- (generated + 1) / 2  # 转换到[0, 1]
  
  return(generated)
}

# 生成数字0-9的示例（使用未训练的模型，结果会是噪声）
par(mfrow = c(10, 5), mar = c(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 0.1))
for (digit in 0:9) {
  images <- generate_conditional_images(cgan_generator, latent_dim, digit, 5)
  for (i in 1:5) {
    image(images[i, , , 1], col = gray.colors(100), axes = FALSE)
  }
}
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

## 8.5 模式崩溃（Mode Collapse）问题与缓解 {#85-模式崩溃mode-collapse问题与缓解}

模式崩溃是GAN训练中的常见问题，指生成器只产生少数几种样本，缺乏多样性。

### 模式崩溃的表现

1. 生成样本缺乏多样性
2. 生成器"欺骗"判别器后停止改进
3. 训练损失震荡剧烈

### 缓解策略

```{r}
# 演示模式崩溃检测
detect_mode_collapse <- function(generated_images, threshold = 0.1) {
  # 计算生成样本之间的平均相似度
  n <- nrow(generated_images)
  
  # 随机采样计算相似度
  sample_size <- min(100, n)
  indices <- sample(1:n, sample_size)
  
  similarities <- numeric(sample_size * (sample_size - 1) / 2)
  k <- 1
  for (i in 1:(sample_size - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):sample_size) {
      similarities[k] <- cor(generated_images[indices[i], ],
                             generated_images[indices[j], ])
      k <- k + 1
    }
  }
  
  avg_similarity <- mean(similarities)
  
  cat("生成样本平均相似度：", round(avg_similarity, 3), "\n")
  
  if (avg_similarity > threshold) {
    cat("警告：可能存在模式崩溃问题！\n")
  } else {
    cat("生成样本多样性正常\n")
  }
  
  return(avg_similarity)
}

# 测试
test_images <- generate_images(generator, latent_dim, 100)
detect_mode_collapse(test_images)
```

### 常用缓解方法

| 方法 | 原理 | 实现难度 |
|:----:|:----:|:--------:|
| Wasserstein GAN | 使用Wasserstein距离替代JS散度 | 中等 |
| 特征匹配 | 让生成器匹配真实样本的中间特征 | 简单 |
| 小批量判别 | 判别器查看一批样本的多样性 | 中等 |
| 谱归一化 | 稳定判别器的Lipschitz常数 | 简单 |
| 渐进式训练 | 从低分辨率逐步增加到高分辨率 | 复杂 |

```{r}
# 实现特征匹配损失
feature_matching_loss <- function(real_features, fake_features) {
  # 计算真实样本和假样本特征的均值差异
  real_mean <- colMeans(real_features)
  fake_mean <- colMeans(fake_features)
  
  loss <- mean((real_mean - fake_mean)^2)
  return(loss)
}

cat("特征匹配损失函数已定义\n")
cat("使用方法：让生成器匹配判别器中间层的特征分布\n")
```

```{r}
# 实现小批量判别
# 在判别器中添加一个层来计算批次内样本的相似性

build_discriminator_with_minibatch <- function(input_shape = c(28, 28, 1)) {
  
  image_input <- layer_input(shape = input_shape)
  
  # 卷积特征提取
  x <- layer_conv_2d(filters = 64, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                     strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(image_input)
  x <- layer_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.2)(x)
  
  x <- layer_conv_2d(filters = 128, kernel_size = c(4, 4),
                     strides = c(2, 2), padding = "same")(x)
  x <- layer_batch_normalization()(x)
  x <- layer_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.2)(x)
  
  # 展平
  features <- layer_flatten()(x)
  
  # 小批量判别层
  # 计算批次内样本之间的距离
  mb_features <- layer_dense(units = 64)(features)
  
  # 输出
  output <- layer_concatenate(list(features, mb_features)) %>%
    layer_dense(units = 1, activation = "sigmoid")
  
  model <- keras_model(image_input, output)
  return(model)
}

cat("带小批量判别的判别器已定义\n")
```

## 8.6 GAN在医学图像生成与数据增强中的应用 {#86-gan在医学图像生成与数据增强中的应用}

### 医学图像生成的应用场景

```{r}
# 模拟医学图像数据增强场景

# 假设我们有一个小型医学图像数据集
# 这里用模拟数据演示

set.seed(456)

# 模拟正常和异常样本
n_normal <- 100
n_abnormal <- 20  # 异常样本较少

# 生成模拟图像（简化为28x28）
generate_medical_image <- function(type = "normal") {
  img <- matrix(0, nrow = 28, ncol = 28)
  
  if (type == "normal") {
    # 正常样本：规则的圆形结构
    for (i in 1:28) {
      for (j in 1:28) {
        dist <- sqrt((i - 14)^2 + (j - 14)^2)
        img[i, j] <- exp(-dist^2 / 50) + rnorm(1, sd = 0.05)
      }
    }
  } else {
    # 异常样本：不规则结构
    for (i in 1:28) {
      for (j in 1:28) {
        dist <- sqrt((i - 12 + rnorm(1, sd = 2))^2 + (j - 14)^2)
        img[i, j] <- exp(-dist^2 / 40) + rnorm(1, sd = 0.1)
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(pmax(pmin(img, 1), 0))
}

# 生成数据集
normal_images <- array(0, dim = c(n_normal, 28, 28, 1))
for (i in 1:n_normal) {
  normal_images[i, , , 1] <- generate_medical_image("normal")
}

abnormal_images <- array(0, dim = c(n_abnormal, 28, 28, 1))
for (i in 1:n_abnormal) {
  abnormal_images[i, , , 1] <- generate_medical_image("abnormal")
}

cat("正常样本数：", n_normal, "\n")
cat("异常样本数：", n_abnormal, "\n")
cat("类别不平衡比例：", n_normal / n_abnormal, ":1\n")
```

```{r}
# 可视化样本
par(mfrow = c(2, 4), mar = c(0.1, 0.1, 0.5, 0.1))

# 正常样本
for (i in 1:4) {
  image(normal_images[i, , , 1], col = gray.colors(100),
        axes = FALSE, main = "正常")
}

# 异常样本
for (i in 1:4) {
  image(abnormal_images[i, , , 1], col = gray.colors(100),
        axes = FALSE, main = "异常")
}

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

### 使用GAN进行数据增强

```{r}
# 为异常样本训练GAN进行数据增强

# 准备训练数据（归一化到[-1, 1]）
x_abnormal <- abnormal_images * 2 - 1

# 构建专门针对异常样本的GAN
abnormal_generator <- build_dcgan_generator(latent_dim)
abnormal_discriminator <- build_dcgan_discriminator()

# 编译
abnormal_discriminator %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.0002, beta_1 = 0.5),
  loss = "binary_crossentropy"
)

freeze_weights(abnormal_discriminator)

abnormal_gan_input <- layer_input(shape = c(latent_dim))
abnormal_gan_output <- abnormal_discriminator(abnormal_generator(abnormal_gan_input))
abnormal_gan <- keras_model(abnormal_gan_input, abnormal_gan_output)

abnormal_gan %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.0002, beta_1 = 0.5),
  loss = "binary_crossentropy"
)

cat("异常样本GAN已创建\n")
```

```{r}
# 训练GAN（使用更多epoch因为数据少）
# 注意：实际应用中需要更多数据或使用迁移学习

train_small_gan <- function(gan, generator, discriminator,
                            x_train, epochs, latent_dim) {
  
  batch_size <- min(16, nrow(x_train))
  n_batches <- max(1, floor(nrow(x_train) / batch_size))
  
  for (epoch in 1:epochs) {
    for (batch in 1:n_batches) {
      # 真实样本
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), min(batch_size, nrow(x_train)))
      real_images <- x_train[idx, , , , drop = FALSE]
      current_batch_size <- nrow(real_images)
      
      # 假样本
      noise <- matrix(runif(current_batch_size * latent_dim, -1, 1),
                      nrow = current_batch_size, ncol = latent_dim)
      fake_images <- predict(generator, noise, verbose = 0)
      
      # 训练判别器
      x_disc <- array(0, dim = c(2 * current_batch_size, 28, 28, 1))
      x_disc[1:current_batch_size, , , ] <- real_images
      x_disc[(current_batch_size + 1):(2 * current_batch_size), , , ] <- fake_images
      y_disc <- c(rep(1, current_batch_size), rep(0, current_batch_size))
      
      d_loss <- discriminator %>% train_on_batch(x_disc, y_disc)
      
      # 训练生成器
      noise <- matrix(runif(current_batch_size * latent_dim, -1, 1),
                      nrow = current_batch_size, ncol = latent_dim)
      y_gen <- rep(1, current_batch_size)
      
      unfreeze_weights(discriminator)
      g_loss <- gan %>% train_on_batch(noise, y_gen)
      freeze_weights(discriminator)
    }
    
    if (epoch %% 50 == 0) {
      cat(sprintf("Epoch %d - D loss: %.4f - G loss: %.4f\n",
                  epoch, d_loss, g_loss))
    }
  }
  
  return(generator)
}

# 训练
set.seed(789)
trained_abnormal_gen <- train_small_gan(
  abnormal_gan, abnormal_generator, abnormal_discriminator,
  x_abnormal, epochs = 100, latent_dim = latent_dim
)
```

```{r}
# 生成合成异常样本
n_synthetic <- 80  # 生成80个合成样本，使总数与正常样本平衡

synthetic_images <- generate_dcgan_images(trained_abnormal_gen, latent_dim, n_synthetic)

cat("合成异常样本数：", n_synthetic, "\n")
cat("增强后异常样本总数：", n_abnormal + n_synthetic, "\n")

# 可视化合成样本
par(mfrow = c(2, 4), mar = c(0.1, 0.1, 0.5, 0.1))
for (i in 1:8) {
  image(synthetic_images[i, , , 1], col = gray.colors(100),
        axes = FALSE, main = "合成异常")
}
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

### GAN应用注意事项

```{r}
# 评估合成样本质量的方法

# 1. 视觉检查
# 由领域专家评估合成样本的真实性

# 2. 统计分布比较
compare_distributions <- function(real_images, synthetic_images) {
  # 比较像素值分布
  real_pixels <- as.vector(real_images)
  synthetic_pixels <- as.vector(synthetic_images)
  
  # Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验
  ks_result <- ks.test(real_pixels, synthetic_pixels)
  
  cat("KS检验p值：", round(ks_result$p.value, 4), "\n")
  
  if (ks_result$p.value > 0.05) {
    cat("合成样本与真实样本分布相似\n")
  } else {
    cat("合成样本与真实样本分布有显著差异\n")
  }
  
  return(ks_result)
}

# 比较分布
compare_distributions(abnormal_images, synthetic_images)
```

### GAN在医学领域的应用总结

| 应用场景 | 优势 | 挑战 |
|:--------:|:----:|:----:|
| 数据增强 | 扩充小数据集 | 需要质量控制 |
| 罕见病样本生成 | 解决类别不平衡 | 模式崩溃风险 |
| 图像翻译 | 多模态转换 | 需要配对数据 |
| 隐私保护 | 合成数据可共享 | 仍需验证隐私性 |
| 图像重建 | 填补缺失信息 | 需要临床验证 |

### GAN最佳实践建议

1. **数据准备**：确保训练数据质量，进行适当的预处理
2. **架构选择**：根据任务选择合适的GAN变体
3. **训练监控**：定期检查生成样本质量和多样性
4. **质量控制**：建立合成样本的筛选机制
5. **临床验证**：合成数据用于临床前需要充分验证
